nasb.text: But as for Me, My eye will have no pity nor will I spare, but I will bring their conduct upon their heads.”

esv.text: As for me, my eye will not spare, nor will I have pity; I will bring their deeds upon their heads.”

cnv.text: 因此，我的眼必不顧惜，我也必不憐恤；我要把他們所行的報應在他們的頭上。”

ccb.text: 因此，我必不顾惜他们，也不怜悯他们，我必照他们的所作所为报应他们。”
